notes: iter8 page-load-html falsified. After prompt submit, URL navigated to genspark.ai/agents?type=super_agent&action=init-agent (SPA route, not a hard /agents?id=<new>). User prompt bubble rendered ('내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다') but NO assistant response appeared and NO '차단' warning HTML page rendered. No Nuxt error boundary toast visible either — the page just hangs in the empty assistant-message state. Engine intercept presumed fired (the XHR did not complete with a normal assistant reply over ~45s), but the HTML body returned by envelope_template (id=12) was silently swallowed by Nuxt fetch — exactly the failure mode the request anticipated. SPA shell was NOT replaced by our full HTML warning page. Conclusion: broadening path_patterns to '/api/agent/ask_proxy,/agents' did not produce a hard page navigation because the SPA never issued a /agents document-level fetch (the route change is client-side push-state, no XHR to /agents). Returning HTML+text/html on the /api/agent/ask_proxy XHR did not trigger any Nuxt fallback rendering. Page-load level intercept requires block_page_load column support in code (page_load_intercept_migration pending) to truly intercept document-level navigation. Next iter should either (a) wait for page_load_intercept_migration to wire block_page_load, or (b) try JSON envelope conforming to the SSE/stream contract Nuxt expects so the bubble itself shows '차단' text instead of relying on full-page replacement.
